steps.title: Show the contrast between pieces
steps.content: The sentence compares two compositions by Reena Esmail. Jhula Jhule intertwines folk melodies, while TaReKiTa features notes imitating the tabla, so the blank must set up a contrast between the two examples.

steps.title: Keep for instance parenthetical
steps.content: A does not clearly connect the second composition. B creates an ungrammatical sentence beginning with "while," and C makes the second work sound like an example of the first. The needed wording sets off "for instance" and uses "while" for contrast. The answer is D.
